title: Principal Frontend Developer at Nucleus Software International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Principal Frontend Developer at Nucleus Software International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Frontend Developer looking for your next big career move? Nucleus Software International Enterprises in Patna offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Nucleus Software International Enterprises:
Nucleus Software International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nucleus Software International Enterprises!
